title: The Top 1% Build AI Presentations Differently. Here's How.
summary: Jeff Su demonstrates Gamma, an AI presentation tool, by walking through a realistic workflow of seven stakeholder-driven editing scenarios including narrative reordering, adding live data slides, verifying statistics, transforming text to charts, fixing visual hierarchy, merging slides, and translating decks. The video emphasizes that AI presentation tools require substantial post-generation editing work to meet corporate requirements.
